sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12263" key="a)pobeli/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποβελίζω</orth>, <sense id="n12263.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">take off the spit,</tr_> <abbr TEIform="abbr">f.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0505.tlg001:1:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sotad.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
